findings.evidence: The formal dynamic runner only supports one fixed legacy fixture and task ID and has no health-check-only mode, so it cannot perform the required fresh DRYRUN-002 health gate before the one allowed full exec-resume run.
findings.required_fix: Add validated fresh fixture and task ID parameters plus a formal health-check mode that uses the same command builder, model, sandbox, event capture, contract validation, write detection, sanitization, and no-fallback policy as full execution.
findings.acceptance_test: Offline tests prove preview creates no fixture or session, reject the fixed legacy path for new live modes, build health and full commands through the same helpers, validate DRYRUN-002 results, classify transient upstream errors, and preserve the legacy classify-existing path without reading or rewriting it.
